overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a video game showing the player character navigating through a dark, damaged underground industrial facility. The player moves from a narrow corridor past storage containers through rubble-filled rooms and into a lit industrial area with NPCs.

scene_state.functional_zone: damaged industrial corridor with large white storage container

agents.ego_description: walking slowly past a large white industrial container in a dark corridor

entered.detail: large white industrial container with yellow trim on the left side of the corridor
metal grate flooring with debris scattered across it
rough concrete wall with exposed pipes and cables
network of industrial pipes running along the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The player begins in a narrow, dark industrial corridor with a large white storage container on the left. The environment is dimly lit with a flashlight, revealing metal grating floors and concrete walls with exposed piping.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark narrow tunnel with exposed rock and bright wall-mounted light

events.description: bright floodlight on right wall becomes visible, illuminating the dark corridor

agents.ego_description: proceeding cautiously through the dark tunnel toward the light source

entered.detail: intense circular floodlight mounted on the right wall illuminating the passage
rough exposed rock face replacing the concrete wall on the left

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the facility, the player enters a darker tunnel section where a bright floodlight on the right wall cuts through the darkness. The left wall transitions to exposed rock face as the floor becomes uneven with dirt and debris.

scene_state.functional_zone: large collapsed room with fallen concrete debris and damaged ceiling

events.description: exiting narrow tunnel into larger collapsed chamber with rubble-strewn floor

agents.ego_description: navigating carefully through the rubble and debris of the collapsed room

entered.detail: large section of collapsed concrete ceiling with hanging rebar and debris
pile of broken concrete blocks and construction debris
cracked concrete support pillar with exposed reinforcement

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the narrow tunnel into a larger chamber where the ceiling has partially collapsed. The floor is covered in gravel and concrete rubble, requiring careful navigation around the debris and damaged structural pillars.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial storage room with metal crates and overhead lighting

events.description: ambient lighting shifts from dark flashlight-only to warmer overhead industrial lighting
armed NPCs become visible standing near industrial equipment

agents.ego_description: entering the lit industrial room and observing the NPCs near the metal crates

notable_agents.action: armed guard standing near metal crates facing the doorway
second figure standing near industrial machinery

entered.detail: large dark metal crate with yellow hazard markings and warning symbols
rows of overhead industrial fluorescent light fixtures illuminating the room
heavy industrial metal door with small window at the far end of the room
yellow warning sign with black symbols on the wall

segments.scene_description: The player enters a well-lit industrial storage room with overhead fluorescent lighting. Large metal crates with hazard markings occupy the center of the room, while two armed NPCs stand near the equipment. A metal door is visible at the far end of the chamber.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a claustrophobic, dark industrial corridor into a brightly lit storage facility. It begins in a narrow passage with metal grating floors and a large white storage container, where a flashlight illuminates exposed piping against concrete walls. As the camera moves deeper, the environment shifts into a darker tunnel where a bright floodlight cuts through the gloom and the walls transition into raw, exposed rock. The scene then opens into a larger chamber with a partially collapsed ceiling, forcing the camera to navigate through a field of gravel and concrete rubble around damaged structural pillars. Finally, the movement leads into a well-lit industrial room under fluorescent lighting, passing large hazard-marked crates and armed NPCs toward a metal door at the far end.
